title: Local well-posedness of the Yang-Mills equation in the Temporal Gauge   below the energy norm
comment:
15 pages, no figures. Some sign and coefficient errors in the
  equations have been fixed
summary:
We show that the Yang-Mills equation in three dimensions is locally
well-posed in the Temporal gauge for initial data in H^s x H^{s-1} for s > 3/4,
if the norm of the initial data is sufficiently small. The main new ingredients
are a splitting of the connection into curl-free and div-free components, and
some product estimates which interact solutions of wave equations Box u = F
with solutions of time integration equations partial_t u = F.
